CONJECTURE_NAME: MonotoneCircuitDepthLowerBound
STATEMENT: For any integer n > 1, there exists a Boolean function f: {0,1}^n → {0,1} in monotone-P that requires monotone circuits of depth at least Ω(n / log n) to compute.
